items.title: Who should replace McCullum as England Test head coach?
items.summary: Brendon McCullum's departure from the role of England Test head coach leaves the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB) with a huge gap to fill ahead of a crucial home Ashes series next summer.

items.title: ‘Don’t be disrespectful’ – Lionel Messi in heated argument with World Cup referee during Argentina’s controversial win
items.summary: LIONEL MESSI was heard having a fiery exchange with the referee during Argentina's World Cup victory against Switzerland. The Albiceleste punched their ticket to the semi-finals following a controversial 3-1 victory over the Swiss national team on Saturday at the Arrowhead in Kansas City, Missouri.

items.title: Gianni Infantino opens door to 64-team World Cup with mind-boggling 128 matches as Fifa chiefs hails expanded new format
items.summary: FIFA boss Gianni Infantino has opened the door to a 64-team World Cup in 2030. Infantino, who wants to be re-elected for a final term as head of the world game next year, has come under global scrutiny after he bowed to Donald Trump’s wishes to waive US striker Folarin Balogun’s red card ban.
